overall.description: A cinematic night scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic neon-lit city intersection. The camera slowly pans left across a busy downtown area with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and dense flying vehicle traffic. Two large holographic koi fish (one blue, one orange) swim across the scene midway through the clip, adding to the cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cyberpunk intersection with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated observation of the busy intersection from a fixed vantage point

entered.detail: large vertical holographic advertisement displaying a woman in white against blue background
tall dark skyscraper with illuminated yellow MILITECH signage at the top
tall building with vertical neon lighting strips in blue and pink
rain-slicked multi-lane road with reflective neon lights and yellow markings

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a sweeping view of a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection at night. Towering glass buildings covered in neon signage surround the wide asphalt plaza, with the prominent Militech building visible in the distance. Flying vehicles traverse the busy airways above the wet, reflective streets, while a large holographic billboard dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic intersection with holographic fish projection

events.description: large blue holographic fish materializes and begins swimming from left to right across the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing stationary observation as the holographic fish enters the scene

entered.detail: large translucent blue holographic koi fish swimming through the air above the traffic

segments.scene_description: A massive blue holographic fish suddenly appears on the left side of the frame, swimming gracefully through the air above the busy intersection. The camera continues its slow leftward pan as the fish moves toward the center, with the neon-lit buildings providing a vibrant backdrop to the surreal projection.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic intersection with dual holographic fish display

events.description: orange holographic fish joins the blue fish, swimming in tandem across the scene
large holographic billboard on the right exits the frame as camera continues panning left

agents.ego_description: observing the two holographic fish swimming together across the urban landscape

entered.detail: large translucent orange-gold holographic koi fish joining the blue fish in the sky

segments.scene_description: The scene becomes even more surreal as a second orange holographic fish joins the blue one, both swimming in tandem across the intersection. As the camera continues panning left, the large billboard on the right exits the frame, bringing the Militech building into clearer view. The two luminous fish glide gracefully past the towering corporate structure, creating a striking contrast between organic forms and the rigid urban architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan across a neon-drenched cyberpunk intersection that evolves from a dense urban vista into a surreal display of holographic art. It begins with a sweeping view of towering glass buildings and wet, reflective streets, where flying vehicles traverse the airways above a wide asphalt plaza. As the camera glides, a massive blue holographic fish emerges on the left, swimming gracefully through the air against the vibrant backdrop of neon signage. The scene then shifts as a second orange holographic fish joins the first in tandem, gliding past the frame while a large billboard exits to reveal the imposing Militech building. Finally, the two luminous creatures swim across the corporate structure, creating a striking contrast between their organic forms and the rigid, futuristic architecture.
